summary: Representative #53621 is closed and should not be reused as an open canonical. The current open Discord canonical is #53198, with #53259 as a useful but not merge-ready PR that needs maintainer review. The Telegram slash/sandbox-explain subfamily remains open because #51286 and #51584 each cover part of #51245. #53783 and #59933 are related session-visibility reports, not duplicates. No close, label, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is safe from this dedupe-only job.

#51245 needs maintainer choice or a coordinated patch path between #51286 and #51584; both PRs are useful but incomplete alone.
